Package com.puppycrawl.tools.checkstyle.site

package com.puppycrawl.tools.checkstyle.site
Contains classes for generating the Checkstyle website.
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    com.puppycrawl.tools.checkstyle
    Contains the implementation of the Checkstyle framework.
  • Class
    Description
    AllCheckSummaries
    Macro to generate table rows for all Checkstyle modules.
    AllCheckSummaries.CheckInfo
    Data holder for each Check module entry.
    ClassAndPropertiesSettersJavadocScraper
    Class for scraping class javadoc and all property setter javadocs from the given checkstyle module.
    DescriptionMacro
    A macro that inserts a description of module from its Javadoc.
    ExampleMacro
    A macro that inserts a snippet of code or configuration from a file.
    JavadocScraperResultUtil
    Class with result data of ClassAndPropertiesSettersJavadocScraper.
    ModuleJavadocParsingUtil
    Utility class for parsing javadocs of modules.
    NotesMacro
    A macro that inserts a notes subsection of module from its Javadoc.
    ParentModuleMacro
    A macro that inserts a link to the parent module.
    PropertiesMacro
    A macro that inserts a table of properties for the given checkstyle module.
    SinceMacro
    A macro that inserts a @since version of module from its Javadoc.
    SiteUtil
    Utility class for site generation.
    SiteUtil.DescriptionExtractor
    Utility class for extracting description from a method's Javadoc.
    ViolationMessagesMacro
    A macro that inserts a list of the violation messages.
    XdocsTemplateParser
    Parser for Checkstyle's xdoc templates.
    XdocsTemplateSink
    A sink for Checkstyle's xdoc templates.
    XdocsTemplateSink.CustomPrintWriter
    A Custom writer that only prints Unix-style newline character.
    XdocsTemplateSinkFactory
    Xdoc template implementation of the SinkFactory.
